channel.title: Life on Sendo
channel.description: Recent content in Life on Sendo

item.title: Anamnesis - A Reminder
item.description:
What made me build this

Lately, I’ve been feeling pretty dispassionate on life. IDK lang talaga if it’s just a really boring staycation sa bahay but I remember I would spend hours and hours of my time to game instead of finishing my Xiao Kai (Homework from HuaSiong) i dont miss you TnT

I barely spend 30 mins playing these days and just press the exit button. I think i’m just growing up if ganon, hard to believe AND accept it tho especially when I think my mental capacity is that of my 18 year old self.
